architecture: Customer Experience Layer: Self-service support portal with topic search and guided answers (Next.js, React)
Conversation API Layer: Handles sessions, consent notices, and escalation requests (Node.js, API Gateway)
Retrieval Layer: Searches approved help articles, product docs, and ticket macros (Vector database, Meridian Vault)
AI Reasoning Layer: Generates grounded answers with confidence and cited sources (LLM, RAG guardrails)
Workflow Layer: Creates tickets only for low-confidence, billing, or sensitive cases (Meridian Workflow Engine)
Integration Layer: Syncs ticket outcomes and customer context (Meridian Connect, support desk API)
Observability Layer: Tracks deflection, answer quality, and escalation trends (Meridian Analytics Hub, Datadog)
Agent Workspace Layer: Support cockpit with queue, draft, and approval controls (React, Next.js)
Ticket Context Layer: Pulls ticket history, customer tier, SLA, and sentiment (Support desk API, Meridian Connect)
Drafting Layer: Produces suggested replies and macro recommendations (LLM, prompt templates)
Policy Guardrail Layer: Blocks unsupported claims and routes sensitive cases for review (Rules engine, AI policy checks)
Approval Workflow Layer: Captures agent edits, approvals, and feedback signals (Meridian Workflow Engine)
Knowledge Feedback Layer: Promotes repeated edited drafts into article candidates (Meridian Vault, Analytics Hub)
Ticket Mining Layer: Clusters repetitive tickets by topic, effort, and resolution pattern (Python, Snowflake)
Knowledge Drafting Layer: Converts best agent answers into article drafts and macros (LLM, template engine)
Approval Workflow Layer: Routes drafts to support, product, finance, or legal owners (Meridian Workflow Engine)
Content Repository Layer: Stores approved articles with audit trails and freshness metadata (Meridian Vault)
Publishing Layer: Pushes approved answers to help center and agent macro library (Meridian Connect, support desk API)
Measurement Layer: Monitors deflection, stale content, and manual-response reduction (Analytics Hub, dbt)
